prestazioni: Engine: LUJ 1.4L Turbo (I4) – Full forged internals including Manley forged pistons (86mm, 9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Upgraded to a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter for 280whp/320wtq on E30 blend fuel.

Drivetrain: South Bend Clutch Stage 2+ twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel (11.5lb) paired to a Getrag M32 6-speed manual transmission with a Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) and upgraded half-shafts from The Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly).

Suspension/Handling: KW Clubsport coilovers (2-way adjustable) with custom valving for the Cruze RS chassis, Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and rear sway bar (22mm), along with polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full set) and spherical bearing rear toe links (SPC Performance). Braking upgraded to DBA 5000 Series rotors (326mm front, 296mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fiberglass) with custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and extended front splitter (carbon fiber overlay). Rear diffuser from Maxton Design (polyurethane) with integrated tow hooks. Side skirts modified to fit 20mm spacers for flush fitment.
Wheels/Tires: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) with Nitto NT05R tires (255/35/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Custom center caps with Chevrolet bowtie logo in red enamel.

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara) with custom red stitching, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom roll cage (8-point, mild steel) from Custom Cages UK. Full interior wrapped in 3M Carbon Fiber vinyl with red accent stitching on the dashboard and door cards.
